rulings.Case Title: MARVIN C. WEINSTADT, D.M.D. VS. DENTSPLY INTERNATIONAL INC., et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint To Add Plaintiffs & Conform To Proof
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF MARVIN WEINSTADT, RICHARD NATHAN MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint To Add Plaintiffs & Conform To Proof GRANT IN PART. PLTF MAY AMEND THE AC TO CLARIFY ALLEGATIONS RE THE CAVITRON AND SURGERY. PLTF MAY AMEND TO (1) CLARIFY THE ALLEGATIONS RE BIOFILM; (2) ADD A SUBCLASS AND INCLUDE ALLEGATIONS RE DEFT'S DIFFERENT DIRECTIONS W/RE TO SURGERY; (3) ADD DR. HUMENIUK AS A CLASS REPRESENTATIVE. COURT DENIES PLTF'S APPLICATION TO ALLEGE THAT THE CAVITRON IS UNFIT FOR ANY DENTAL PURPOSE. THIS ORDER IS CONDITIONED ON DEFT BEING ABLE TO BRING ANOTHER MSJ. PLTF MAY ALSO NEED TO AGREE TO A SHORTENED MSJ BRIEFING SCHEDULE. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaints
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT PHIL O'CONNOR MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaints GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: AUBURN HATCHER et al VS. AMCORD, INC., et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT DANA CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION AND CONCEALMENT GRANTED. BURDEN SHIFTED BY DEPOSITION OF HATCHER STATING LACK OF COMMUNICATION WHICH COURT FINDS SUFFICIENT TO SHIFT BURDEN. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION AND CONCEALMENT DENIED. COURT FINDS NO NEGATIVE DISCOVERY RESPONSE AS TO THESE CAUSES OF ACTION AND ACCORDINGLY BURDEN NOT SHIFTED. (302/AJR/HE)

rulings.Case Title: AUBURN HATCHER et al VS. AMCORD, INC., et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCK AND CO. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. HATCHER DEPOSITION IDENTIFIES SEARS ADEQUATELY AS SUPPLIER OF BRAKE MATERIAL. ACCORDINGLY BURDEN IS NOT SHIFTED BY NEGATIVE DISCOVERY RESPONSE. SIMILARLY BURDEN NOT SHIFTED TO REQUIRE PLTF TO INTRODUCE ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE THAT SEARS BRAKE MATERIAL CONTAIN ASBESTOS. ALTERNATIVELY COURT OVERRULES OBJECTIONS TO NEWSOP DEPOSITION AND FINDS TRIALABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE ASBESTOS CONTENT OF BRAKE MATERIAL SUPPLIED BY SEARS. (302/AJR/HE)
